subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。両手の親指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Begin with the Index Finger Base. Release both thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指で、小指の向こう側の糸を下から取って引き出します
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pass under all the strings and pick up from below the far little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指の手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up the near index strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、小指と繋がっている上の糸は外さずに、親指同士を繋いでいる下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, keep the upper strings that run to the little fingers, and release only the lower string that runs between the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左手の指先を手前に、右手の指先を向こう側に向けて完成です
subtitle.en: Turn the left fingertips toward yourself and the right fingertips away, and this completes the figure.
